channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Spyke.space: Field Notes

item.title: Signals
item.description:
Things that have passed through my attention lately.

Recently Heard

  • A Summer’s Heat Pt. 1

Recently Read

Recently Watched

Recently Noticed

  • Exploring ways to leave passive traces of listening on this site

item.title: About
item.description: My field notes are where I’ll drop reflections on experiences and updates about what’s going on; what I’m watching, listening to, doing. Early-morning and late-night musings when things are quiet and I can hear myself think.
